MINI MINUTES: Gregory Melvin Haynes, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff. Kathleen S. Morris, Esq., appearing for Defendant.
Plaintiff's Motion to set aside dismissal issued on 11/22/2005 is heard this day. After argument of respective counsel court ordered motion to set aside dismissal granted subject to payment of all outstanding sanctions previously incurred by Plaintiff's counsel for failure to appear at the Order to Show Cause hearings on 10/28/2004 in the amount of $250.00 and 1/25/2005 in the amount of $250. Court ordered Plaintiff's counsel further sanctioned $250.00 for failure to arbitrate prior to the order to Show Cause on 11/22/2005. All sanctions including sanction order issued today to be paid within 45 days. Plaintiff's counsel to submit an order vacating dismissal. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez.
